note: Measured by actually running the suites against the working tree of this verification pass; counts are not copied from an earlier run.

provenance.note: The suites were run against the working tree that becomes this pass's final commits (a descendant of 6bb9ca0). Physical HoloOcean evaluations A/B were NOT re-run; the four PPO/CLI smokes listed below WERE run on real HoloOcean this pass.

suites.command: conda run -n ocean python -m pytest tests/learning -q
conda run -n marine_race_rl python -m pytest tests/learning -q

manual_real_holoocean_validations: Frozen Evaluation A fixed-start 50 seeds (not re-run this pass)
Frozen Evaluation B randomized-start 50 seeds (not re-run this pass)
Public-model CLI smoke on unseen seed 3001 (FINISHED, holoocean, no fallback)
BC-init resume to 1,500 steps (eval history appended, no duplicate timestep-zero)

focused_tests_this_pass: BC->PPO deterministic transfer + per-axis log_std + stochastic warm-start + save/load (test_bc_ppo_init, test_bc_ppo_transfer)
launcher dry-run + output-directory safety + resume gate (test_launch_stage1_ppo)
ci_status: No hosted GitHub CI checks on this commit (documented decision: HoloOcean is not installable in a hosted runner; the real-HoloOcean smokes above are run locally in the marine_race_rl env).
